name: Calculadora de Cambio Porcentual
desc: Calcula el aumento o disminución porcentual entre dos valores.
description: Calcula el aumento o disminución porcentual entre dos valores.
seo_description: Calcula la variación o cambio porcentual entre dos valores. Aumento, bajada, diferencia en % gratis. Con ejemplos resueltos.
example_label: Calculate the percentage increase from 1,250 to 1,487.50 units sold month-over-month

range_hints.valor_final: Can be higher or lower than initial for growth/decline

result_context: The cambio_pct of {cambio_pct}% represents the relative change from initial to final value, while diferencia ({diferencia}) shows the absolute numeric difference.
mistakes: Dividing by final value instead of initial value
Not using absolute value of initial when it's negative
Confusing percentage point change with percentage change
